name: comfydex
description: Connect Codex to a usable local ComfyUI developer toolchain for workflows, safe automation, runs, assets, desktop review, and custom nodes.

interface.longDescription: Comfydex helps Codex generate and inspect ComfyUI workflows, choose workflow recipes through a Scenario Recipe Registry, explain supported ComfyUI nodes through a Node Semantic Registry, run safe generate-run-fetch automation, submit prompts, follow queue execution, collect run outputs, maintain a local project index through a Python MCP server, validate custom node packages, productize the ComfyUI Live Bridge, and browse project assets, reports, cleanup plans, comparisons, batches, and Live Bridge status through a Windows-first desktop shell.
defaultPrompt: Submit a workflow and fetch outputs.
Generate a safe ComfyUI workflow from this request.
Suggest ComfyUI workflow recipes for this request.
Verify my ComfyUI Live Bridge status.
Explain this ComfyUI node with the Node Semantic Registry.
